eval_results.name: backend-task-routing
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly selected backend-architect with 0.92 confidence for REST API + PostgreSQL task

eval_results.name: frontend-task-routing
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly selected mobile-developer with 0.95 confidence for Flutter/Riverpod task

eval_results.name: ambiguous-task-routing
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly flagged cross-domain ambiguity (confidence: 0.55), suggested task decomposition

eval_results.name: multi-agent-suggestion
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly identified mobile-developer + backend-architect split with parallel execution plan

eval_results.name: fallback-routing
eval_results.key_finding: Correctly fell back to tech-lead for broad architectural review with clear rationale

strengths: Accurate single-agent routing for domain-specific tasks (Flutter, Python/FastAPI)
Proper confidence scoring with low scores on cross-domain tasks
Clear routing rationale citing task keywords and file paths
Correct multi-agent split for tasks spanning mobile and backend domains
Reliable tech-lead fallback for cross-cutting concerns
weaknesses: No agent registry versioning — routing depends on hardcoded agent list
Confidence calibration not yet validated on edge cases
recommendations: Add agent registry file to decouple routing logic from skill code
Test with domain-adjacent tasks (e.g. mobile backend-for-frontend)
Add support for routing to custom user-defined agents
